title: Lemon Tea
description: Step-by-step Lemon Tea recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 4 tbsp Mom Masale Lemon Tea Premix

steps: Bring 4 cups of water to a rolling boil in a saucepan.
Turn off the heat once the water reaches a boil.
Add 4 tablespoons of Mom Masale Lemon Tea Premix and stir well until fully dissolved.
Strain into serving cups and enjoy hot for a refreshing cup of lemon tea.

seo.title: Lemon Tea Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Lemon Tea at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.

title: Kadak Masala Chai
description: Step-by-step Kadak Masala Chai recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: ½ tsp Mom Masale Kadak Chai Masala

steps: In a saucepan, combine water, tea leaves, and sugar.
Bring to a boil.
Add the milk and allow the tea to boil again over medium heat.
Stir in Mom Masale Kadak Chai Masala and simmer for another minute.
Strain and serve hot with biscuits or your favorite snacks.

seo.title: Kadak Masala Chai Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Kadak Masala Chai at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.
keywords: how to make kadak masala chai

title: Rose Syrup Sharbat
description: Step-by-step Rose Syrup Sharbat recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.
steps: Pour 2 tablespoons of Mom Masale Rose Syrup into each serving glass.
Add chilled milk or water.
Stir thoroughly.
Add ice cubes and serve immediately.

seo.title: Rose Syrup Sharbat Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Rose Syrup Sharbat at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.
keywords: how to make rose syrup sharbat

title: Dry Fruit Milk Shake
description: Step-by-step Dry Fruit Milk Shake recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 4 tbsp Mom Masale Dry Fruit Milk Shake Powder

steps: Pour chilled milk into a blender.
Add Mom Masale Dry Fruit Milk Shake Powder.
Blend for 1–2 minutes until smooth, creamy, and frothy.
Pour into glasses and garnish with finely chopped almonds and pistachios before serving.

seo.title: Dry Fruit Milk Shake Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Dry Fruit Milk Shake at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.
keywords: how to make dry fruit milk shake

title: Shahi Thandai
description: Step-by-step Shahi Thandai recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 4 tbsp Mom Masale Shahi Thandai Powder

steps: Soak the Mom Masale Shahi Thandai Powder in ½ cup of lukewarm milk for 10 minutes.
Transfer it to a blender with the remaining chilled milk and sugar.
Blend until smooth.
Refrigerate for about an hour before serving chilled.

seo.title: Shahi Thandai Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Shahi Thandai at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.

title: Savoury Sattu Sharbat
description: Step-by-step Savoury Sattu Sharbat recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.
steps: Mix the sattu with a little water until completely lump-free.
Add the remaining water.
Stir in the lemon juice, black salt, and regular salt.
Sprinkle Mom Masale Chaat Masala over the top.
If desired, garnish with finely chopped onions and green chillies before serving.

seo.title: Savoury Sattu Sharbat Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Savoury Sattu Sharbat at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.
keywords: how to make savoury sattu sharbat

title: Moringa Sattu Energy Drink
description: Step-by-step Moringa Sattu Energy Drink recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.
steps: Combine chilled water and Mom Masale Moringa Sattu in a large jug.
Stir until completely dissolved.
Add black salt and fresh lemon juice.
Mix well and serve chilled as a healthy, energizing breakfast drink.

seo.title: Moringa Sattu Energy Drink Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Moringa Sattu Energy Drink at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.
keywords: how to make moringa sattu energy drink

title: Jaljeera Drink
description: Step-by-step Jaljeera Drink recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.
steps: Mix the Mom Masale Jaljeera Masala with chilled water and lemon juice.
Stir thoroughly until well combined.
Taste and strain if desired.
Pour into serving glasses.
Top with boondi and serve immediately while chilled.

seo.title: Jaljeera Drink Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Jaljeera Drink at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.

title: Spiced Buttermilk (Chatpata Chaach)
description: Step-by-step Spiced Buttermilk (Chatpata Chaach) recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 1½ tsp Mom Masale Chatpata Chaach Masala

steps: Whisk the yogurt until smooth.
Add chilled water and mix to prepare buttermilk.
Stir in Mom Masale Chatpata Chaach Masala until evenly blended.
Serve chilled alongside lunch or any traditional Indian meal.

seo.title: Spiced Buttermilk (Chatpata Chaach) Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Spiced Buttermilk (Chatpata Chaach) at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.
keywords: how to make spiced buttermilk (chatpata chaach)

title: Poha (Seasoned Flattened Rice)
description: Step-by-step Poha (Seasoned Flattened Rice) recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 1½ tbsp Mom Masale Poha Masala (Jiravan Masala)

steps: Wash the poha under running water and drain well. Let it rest for 10 minutes.
Heat oil in a pan and roast the peanuts until crisp. Remove and keep aside.
In the same pan, splutter the mustard seeds and curry leaves.
Add the chopped onion (and green chilli, if desired) and sauté until translucent.
Add the poha, roasted peanuts, and Mom Masale Poha Masala (Jiravan Masala).
Mix gently, cover, and cook over low heat for 2 minutes.
Serve hot.

seo.title: Poha (Seasoned Flattened Rice) Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Poha (Seasoned Flattened Rice) at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.
keywords: how to make poha (seasoned flattened rice)

title: Aloo Kachori
description: Step-by-step Aloo Kachori recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 2 cups Wheat Flour or Refined Flour
For shortening and deep frying Oil or Ghee

steps: Mix flour with salt and 2 teaspoons of oil or ghee. Knead into a firm dough.
Combine mashed potatoes with Mom Masale Kachori Masala and salt.
Divide the dough into small balls.
Stuff each with the potato filling and seal carefully.
Roll gently.
Deep fry over low to medium heat until golden brown and crisp.
Serve with chutney or pickle.

seo.title: Aloo Kachori Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Aloo Kachori at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.

title: Dahi Bada
description: Step-by-step Dahi Bada recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 1 packet Mom Masale Instant Dahi Bada Premix
2 tsp Mom Masale Dahi Bada Masala

steps: Prepare a thick batter using the premix and water.
Let it rest for 10 minutes.
Fry spoonfuls of batter until golden.
Soak the fried vadas in lukewarm water for about 10 minutes.
Gently squeeze out excess water.
Transfer to whisked yogurt.
Sprinkle Mom Masale Dahi Bada Masala and drizzle sweet tamarind chutney before serving.

seo.title: Dahi Bada Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Dahi Bada at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.

title: Pani Puri
description: Step-by-step Pani Puri recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 2 tbsp Mom Masale Jaljeera / Pani Puri Masala

steps: Mix the masala with chilled water until completely dissolved.
Mash together the boiled potatoes and chickpeas with a little salt.
Crack open each puri.
Fill with the potato mixture.
Add the prepared spicy water.
Serve immediately.

seo.title: Pani Puri Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Pani Puri at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.

title: Pav Bhaji
description: Step-by-step Pav Bhaji recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 3 cups Mixed Boiled Vegetables (Potatoes, Peas, Cauliflower)
2 tbsp Mom Masale Pav Bhaji Masala
1 cup each Onion, Tomato & Capsicum (finely chopped)

steps: Mash the boiled vegetables thoroughly.
Melt butter in a pan.
Sauté onions, ginger-garlic paste, and capsicum.
Add tomatoes and cook until soft.
Add the mashed vegetables and Mom Masale Pav Bhaji Masala.
Pour in a little water and simmer for 10 minutes.
Toast the pav in butter and serve with the bhaji, chopped onions, and lemon wedges.

seo.title: Pav Bhaji Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Pav Bhaji at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.

title: Chatpata Pakora
description: Step-by-step Chatpata Pakora recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 1 tbsp Mom Masale Chatpata Sprinkle Masala
½ tsp Mom Masale Turmeric Powder

steps: Prepare a thick batter by mixing gram flour, turmeric, salt, vegetables, and enough water.
Heat oil in a deep pan.
Drop spoonfuls of batter into the hot oil.
Fry until crisp and golden.
Remove and immediately sprinkle generously with Mom Masale Chatpata Sprinkle Masala.
Serve hot with tea.

seo.title: Chatpata Pakora Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Chatpata Pakora at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.

title: Fruit Chaat
description: Step-by-step Fruit Chaat recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 4 cups Seasonal Fruits (Apple, Banana, Papaya, Pomegranate)

steps: Combine all chopped fruits in a large bowl.
Add fresh lemon juice.
Sprinkle Mom Masale Chaat Masala.
Toss gently.
Serve immediately.

seo.title: Fruit Chaat Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Fruit Chaat at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.

title: Mixed Fruit Salad
description: Step-by-step Mixed Fruit Salad recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 3 cups Cucumber, Tomato, Carrot & Apple Slices
1 tsp Mom Masale Fruit & Salad Masala

steps: Arrange all sliced fruits and vegetables attractively on a serving platter.
Sprinkle Mom Masale Fruit & Salad Masala evenly just before serving.

seo.title: Mixed Fruit Salad Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Mixed Fruit Salad at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.
keywords: how to make mixed fruit salad

title: Booknu Potato Chaat
description: Step-by-step Booknu Potato Chaat recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.
steps: Heat ghee or oil in a pan.
Sauté the diced potatoes until lightly crisp.
Transfer to a serving plate.
Sprinkle Mom Masale Booknu evenly over the potatoes.
Add lemon juice and toss gently.
Serve hot as a flavorful digestive snack.

seo.title: Booknu Potato Chaat Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Booknu Potato Chaat at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.
keywords: how to make booknu potato chaat

title: Matar Paneer
description: Step-by-step Matar Paneer recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 1½ tbsp Mom Masale Matar Paneer Masala
½ tsp Mom Masale Turmeric Powder
½ tsp Mom Masale Red Chilli Powder
½ tsp Mom Masale Coriander Powder

steps: Heat oil in a pan and sauté the onion-tomato paste until well cooked.
Add Mom Masale Turmeric Powder, Red Chilli Powder, Coriander Powder, and Matar Paneer Masala. Cook over low heat until the oil begins to separate.
Add the green peas and paneer cubes.
Pour in 1½ cups of water and season with salt.
Cover and simmer for about 10 minutes.
Serve hot with naan, roti, or steamed rice.

seo.title: Matar Paneer Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Matar Paneer at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.

title: Shahi Paneer
description: Step-by-step Shahi Paneer recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 1½ tbsp Mom Masale Shahi Paneer Masala

steps: Heat ghee in a pan and sauté the tomato-cashew paste until fragrant.
Add Mom Masale Shahi Paneer Masala and cook for another minute.
Pour in the milk instead of water and bring to a gentle boil.
Add the paneer cubes and fresh cream.
Simmer over low heat for 5 minutes.
Serve hot with naan, kulcha, or jeera rice.

seo.title: Shahi Paneer Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Shahi Paneer at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.

title: Kadai Paneer
description: Step-by-step Kadai Paneer recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 1½ tbsp Mom Masale Kadai Paneer Masala

steps: Heat oil and stir-fry the capsicum and onions over high heat for about 2 minutes. Remove and set aside.
In the same pan, cook the tomato purée with Mom Masale Kadai Paneer Masala until aromatic.
Add the paneer, sautéed vegetables, and water.
Simmer for about 5 minutes.
Crush Mom Masale Kasuri Methi between your palms and sprinkle over the curry just before serving.

seo.title: Kadai Paneer Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Kadai Paneer at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.

title: Chole Masala
description: Step-by-step Chole Masala recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: ½ tsp Mom Masale Amchur Powder
To taste Mom Masale Red Chilli Powder

steps: Heat oil in a pan and sauté the onions until golden.
Add the tomatoes and cook until soft.
Stir in Mom Masale Chole Masala, red chilli powder, and salt.
Add the boiled chickpeas and Mom Masale Amchur Powder.
Simmer for about 12 minutes so the chickpeas absorb the flavours.
Garnish with fresh coriander and serve with bhature, puri, or rice.

seo.title: Chole Masala Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Chole Masala at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.

title: Dal Makhani
description: Step-by-step Dal Makhani recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 2 cups Boiled Whole Black Gram & Kidney Beans
1½ tbsp Mom Masale Dal Makhani Masala

steps: Melt butter in a heavy-bottomed pan.
Sauté the ginger-garlic paste, then add the tomato purée and cook until well blended.
Add Mom Masale Dal Makhani Masala and mix thoroughly.
Stir in the cooked lentils and kidney beans.
Simmer over low heat for about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Finish with fresh cream and serve hot.

seo.title: Dal Makhani Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Dal Makhani at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.

title: Dum Aloo
description: Step-by-step Dum Aloo recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 1½ tbsp Mom Masale Dum Aloo Masala

steps: Deep fry the potatoes until lightly golden.
Heat a little oil in another pan and sauté the onion paste.
Reduce the heat and stir in the whisked yogurt along with Mom Masale Dum Aloo Masala.
Add the fried potatoes.
Cover and cook over low heat for about 10 minutes.
Serve hot with Indian breads.

seo.title: Dum Aloo Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Dum Aloo at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.

title: Sambar
description: Step-by-step Sambar recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 1½ cups Cooked Toor Dal (Pigeon Pea Lentils)
1 cup Mixed Vegetables (Drumsticks, Pumpkin, Bottle Gourd, Brinjal, Okra, French Beans, Carrot, Potato)

steps: Boil the vegetables separately with a little water and salt until tender.
Add the cooked vegetables, tamarind pulp, and Mom Masale Sambar Masala to the cooked dal.
Bring to a gentle boil.
Heat oil in a small pan and prepare a tempering with mustard seeds, dried red chillies, and curry leaves.
Pour the tempering over the sambar.
Serve hot with steamed rice, idli, dosa, or vada.

seo.title: Sambar Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Sambar at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.

title: Mixed Vegetable Stir-Fry
description: Step-by-step Mixed Vegetable Stir-Fry recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: ½ tsp Mom Masale Turmeric Powder
½ tsp Mom Masale Red Chilli Powder
½ tsp Mom Masale Coriander Powder

steps: Heat oil in a pan and add the cumin seeds. Allow them to splutter.
Add the mixed vegetables and sauté for about 5 minutes.
Stir in Mom Masale Sabzi Masala, Turmeric Powder, Red Chilli Powder, Coriander Powder, and salt.
Mix well, cover, and cook over low heat until the vegetables are tender.
Stir occasionally to prevent sticking.
Serve hot with chapati or dal and rice.

seo.title: Mixed Vegetable Stir-Fry Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Mixed Vegetable Stir-Fry at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.
keywords: how to make mixed vegetable stir-fry

title: Stuffed Baby Eggplants (Bharwa Baingan)
description: Step-by-step Stuffed Baby Eggplants (Bharwa Baingan) recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 3 tbsp Mom Masale Kalonji Stuffing Masala

steps: In a bowl, combine Mom Masale Kalonji Stuffing Masala, Mom Masale Amchur Powder, and 1 tablespoon of oil to form a dry stuffing mixture.
Carefully fill each slit eggplant with the prepared spice mixture.
Heat the remaining oil in a heavy-bottomed pan.
Arrange the stuffed eggplants in a single layer.
Cover and cook over low heat, turning occasionally, until the eggplants become soft and evenly cooked.
Serve hot with roti or paratha.

seo.title: Stuffed Baby Eggplants (Bharwa Baingan) Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Stuffed Baby Eggplants (Bharwa Baingan) at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.
keywords: how to make stuffed baby eggplants (bharwa baingan)

title: Stuffed Okra (Bharwa Bhindi)
description: Step-by-step Stuffed Okra (Bharwa Bhindi) recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 2 tbsp Mom Masale Kalonji Stuffing Masala

steps: Wash the okra thoroughly and dry completely to remove all moisture.
Make a lengthwise slit in each okra without cutting it into two pieces.
Fill each okra with Mom Masale Kalonji Stuffing Masala.
Heat oil in a pan and arrange the stuffed okra in a single layer.
Cook uncovered over low heat until the okra becomes tender and lightly crisp.
Turn gently during cooking to avoid breaking the filling.
Serve hot.

seo.title: Stuffed Okra (Bharwa Bhindi) Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Stuffed Okra (Bharwa Bhindi) at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.
keywords: how to make stuffed okra (bharwa bhindi)

title: Stuffed Bitter Gourd (Bharwa Karela)
description: Step-by-step Stuffed Bitter Gourd (Bharwa Karela) recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 3 tbsp Mom Masale Kalonji Stuffing Masala

steps: Rub the bitter gourds with salt and leave them aside for about 20 minutes to reduce bitterness.
Rinse thoroughly and pat dry.
Heat oil in a pan and sauté the chopped onions until lightly golden.
Add Mom Masale Kalonji Stuffing Masala and mix well.
Stuff the prepared onion mixture into each bitter gourd.
Tie each stuffed bitter gourd securely with kitchen thread to prevent the filling from spilling out during cooking.
Place them in a pan with a little oil, cover, and cook over low heat.
Turn occasionally until all sides are evenly browned and the bitter gourds are tender.
Remove the thread before serving.

seo.title: Stuffed Bitter Gourd (Bharwa Karela) Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Stuffed Bitter Gourd (Bharwa Karela) at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.
keywords: how to make stuffed bitter gourd (bharwa karela)

title: Vegetable Biryani
description: Step-by-step Vegetable Biryani recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.
steps: Marinate the mixed vegetables with the yogurt and Mom Masale Biryani Masala for 15 minutes.
Cook the marinated vegetables until they are tender.
In a heavy-bottomed pot, spread a layer of the cooked vegetables.
Add a layer of the partially cooked basmati rice over the vegetables.
Drizzle with ghee and sprinkle fried onions on top.
Cover the pot tightly and cook on low heat ("dum") for about 10 minutes.
Gently fluff the biryani before serving.
Serve hot with raita or pickle.

seo.title: Vegetable Biryani Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Vegetable Biryani at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.

title: Hyderabadi Vegetable Biryani
description: Step-by-step Hyderabadi Vegetable Biryani recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 2½ tbsp Mom Masale Hyderabadi Biryani Mix Masala

steps: Cook the vegetables and paneer halfway with Mom Masale Hyderabadi Biryani Mix Masala and ghee.
Spread the partially cooked vegetable mixture evenly in a heavy-bottomed pot.
Layer the partially cooked basmati rice over the vegetables.
Sprinkle fresh mint leaves across the top.
Seal the pot tightly with a lid (or dough for traditional dum cooking).
Cook over low heat for approximately 15 minutes.
Allow the biryani to rest for 5 minutes before opening the lid.
Gently fluff the rice and serve hot with raita, salan, or yogurt.

seo.title: Hyderabadi Vegetable Biryani Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Hyderabadi Vegetable Biryani at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.
keywords: how to make hyderabadi vegetable biryani

title: Masala Poori
description: Step-by-step Masala Poori recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: ½ tsp Mom Masale Garam Masala
¼ tsp Mom Masale Turmeric Powder
¼ tsp Mom Masale Red Chilli Powder

steps: Combine the flour with Mom Masale Garam Masala, turmeric powder, red chilli powder, salt, and 2 teaspoons of oil.
Knead into a firm dough using water as required.
Divide the dough into small portions and roll into evenly sized pooris.
Heat oil in a deep pan.
Fry each poori until it puffs up and turns golden brown on both sides.
Serve hot with potato curry, chole, or pickle.

seo.title: Masala Poori Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Masala Poori at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.

title: Aloo Paratha
description: Step-by-step Aloo Paratha recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: As desired Green Chillies, finely chopped

steps: Mix the mashed potatoes with salt, green chillies, Mom Masale Chaat Masala, and crushed Mom Masale Kasuri Methi.
Divide the dough into equal portions.
Stuff each portion with the potato filling and seal carefully.
Roll into thick parathas.
Cook on a hot griddle, applying ghee or oil on both sides.
Cook until golden brown and crisp.
Serve with yogurt, pickle, or butter.

seo.title: Aloo Paratha Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Aloo Paratha at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.

title: Booknu Paratha
description: Step-by-step Booknu Paratha recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.
steps: Roll a portion of dough into a thin chapati.
Spread a thin layer of ghee over the surface.
Sprinkle about ½ teaspoon of Mom Masale Booknu evenly across the dough.
Fold into a triangle (or preferred layered shape).
Roll out gently again.
Roast on a hot griddle with ghee until both sides become crisp and golden.
Serve hot with curd, pickle, or tea.

seo.title: Booknu Paratha Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Booknu Paratha at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.

title: Gulab Jamun
description: Step-by-step Gulab Jamun recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 1 packet Mom Masale Gulab Jamun Mix
As required (for kneading) Milk or Water
For deep frying Ghee or Oil

steps: In a saucepan, combine the sugar and water.
Bring to a boil, stirring until the sugar dissolves completely.
Simmer for a few minutes until a light, slightly sticky syrup forms.
Keep the syrup warm.
Transfer the Mom Masale Gulab Jamun Mix to a mixing bowl.
Gradually add milk (or water) and knead into a soft, smooth dough.
Divide the dough into equal portions and roll into smooth, crack-free balls.
Heat ghee or oil over low to medium heat.
Fry the dough balls gently until they turn an even deep golden brown.
Remove carefully and immediately immerse them in the warm sugar syrup.
Allow them to soak for at least 2 hours so they absorb the syrup completely.
Serve warm or at room temperature.

seo.title: Gulab Jamun Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Gulab Jamun at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.

title: Kheer (Indian Rice Pudding)
description: Step-by-step Kheer (Indian Rice Pudding) recipe made with Mom Masale ingredients for authentic Indian flavour.

ingredients.text: 1 packet (approximately 4 tbsp) Mom Masale Kheer Premix

steps: Pour 1 litre of full-cream milk into a heavy-bottomed saucepan or kadai.
Bring the milk to a full boil over medium-high heat.
Reduce the heat to low.
Gradually add the Mom Masale Kheer Premix, stirring continuously to prevent lumps from forming.
Cook over low to medium heat for 12–15 minutes, stirring frequently to prevent the kheer from sticking to the bottom of the pan.
Continue cooking until the rice is fully cooked and the kheer becomes rich and creamy.
Keep in mind that the kheer will thicken further as it cools, so avoid over-reducing it.
Remove from the heat.
Serve warm, or chill in the refrigerator for 1–2 hours before serving.
Garnish with chopped almonds or pistachios, if desired.

seo.title: Kheer (Indian Rice Pudding) Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make Kheer (Indian Rice Pudding) at home with this easy Mom Masale recipe.
keywords: how to make kheer (indian rice pudding)
